channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [TEXRAIL] Texmaco Rail bags ₹0.39 Cr order from South Eastern Railway
item.description:
Texmaco Rail & Engineering Ltd has received a domestic order valued at ₹0.39 crore (excluding taxes) from South Eastern Railway. The contract involves the supply of Bogie Frame Assembly for Non-AC Air Spring Type LHB FIAT Bogie. The company is required to execute this order on or before September 13, 2026. Texmaco Rail confirmed that there is no promoter or related party interest in this transaction.

  • Texmaco Rail secured a ₹0.39 Cr order from South Eastern Railway.
  • The order is for supplying Bogie Frame Assembly for LHB FIAT Bogie.
  • The domestic contract is to be completed by September 13, 2026.
  • No related party or promoter interest in the transaction.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TEXMACO RAIL & ENGINEERING LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [SHAYONAENG] Shayona Engineering Exempt from Corporate Governance Report Submission
item.description:
Shayona Engineering Ltd has informed that the provisions relating to the submission of the Corporate Governance Report under Regulation 27(2) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, are not applicable to the company. This exemption also extends to Regulations 15(2) and 17 to 27 (except Regulation 23), along with certain clauses of Regulation 46(2) and paras C, D, and E of Schedule V. The company clarifies that these provisions do not apply to listed entities on the SME Exchange, and since Shayona Engineering is listed on the SME Platform of BSE Limited, it is not required to submit the Corporate Governance Report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.

  • Shayona Engineering is exempt from SEBI LODR corporate governance provisions.
  • Exemption applies due to the company's listing on the SME Platform.
  • Company not required to submit Corporate Governance Report for Q4 FY26.
  • This clarifies regulatory compliance for SME-listed entities.
  • Investors should note the company's specific regulatory status.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shayona Engineering Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [RUBICON] Rubicon Research acquires 85% stake in Arinna Lifesciences for ₹175.92 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Rubicon Research Limited has entered into definitive agreements to acquire an 85% stake in Arinna Lifesciences Limited for approximately ₹175.92 Crores in cash. Arinna, a branded pharmaceutical marketing company headquartered in Ahmedabad, specializes in the CNS/neuro-psychiatric therapeutic segment in the Indian domestic market. Arinna reported a turnover of ₹71.5 crores for FYE March 2025. This acquisition aligns with Rubicon's strategy to leverage its IP and chronic products portfolio, particularly in the CNS category, and gain access to Arinna's established sales and distribution network in India for its differentiated offerings. The transaction values Arinna at an enterprise value of ₹200 Crores and is expected to be completed within one month.

  • Rubicon Research acquires 85% stake in Arinna Lifesciences for ₹175.92 Cr cash.
  • Arinna, a CNS-focused pharma marketer, had ₹71.5 Cr turnover in FY25.
  • Acquisition expands Rubicon's presence in India's CNS therapeutic market.
  • Arinna's sales network provides access for Rubicon's specialty products.
  • The deal is expected to close within one month.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rubicon Research Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [VGUARD] V-Guard receives GST Show Cause Notice for ₹17.76 Cr excess ITC
item.description:
🔥 Trending

V-Guard Industries Ltd. has received a Show Cause Notice (SCN) from the Joint Commissioner, CGST, Audit Commissionerate, Dehradun, dated April 14, 2026. The SCN, issued under section 74(1) of the CGST Act, 2017, pertains to the alleged availment of excess Input Tax Credit (ITC) and short payment in GSTR-9 reconciliation for the financial years 2020-21 to 2023-24. The communicated short payment of GST is ₹17,75,91,197. While interest and penalty are not yet quantified, their levy is proposed under sections 74(1) and 50(3)/(1). V-Guard is currently evaluating the notice and intends to file a rebuttal, asserting strong grounds to challenge the observations. The company clarified that this SCN is a subsequent step to a final audit report (GST ADT-02) that was previously disclosed on April 7, 2026.

  • V-Guard received a GST Show Cause Notice on April 14, 2026.
  • Notice alleges ₹17.76 Cr short GST payment for FY20-24.
  • It cites excess ITC availment and GSTR-9 reconciliation issues.
  • Company plans to file a rebuttal, confident in its challenge.
  • Interest and penalty are proposed but not yet quantified.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: V-GUARD INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [SPELS] SPEL Semiconductor Q3 FY26 Net Loss at ₹12.47 Cr
item.description:
SPEL Semiconductor Ltd. announced its unaudited financial results for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. The Board of Directors approved these results on April 15, 2026, following the Audit Committee's recommendation. The company reported a total income of ₹200.68 Lakhs for the quarter. The net loss for the period was substantial, amounting to ₹1246.53 Lakhs (₹12.47 Crores). Basic Earnings Per Share (EPS) for the quarter stood at (₹2.70). The results indicate a challenging financial quarter for the company, which operates in a single segment of manufacturing and sale of Integrated Circuits.

  • SPEL Semiconductor reported a net loss of ₹12.47 Crores for Q3 FY26.
  • Total income for the quarter stood at ₹200.68 Lakhs.
  • Basic EPS for the period was a negative ₹2.70.
  • The Board approved unaudited financial results on April 15, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SPEL SEMICONDUCTOR LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [STYLEBAAZA] Baazar Style Retail settles fire insurance claim for ₹23 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Baazar Style Retail Ltd announced the settlement of an insurance claim for a fire incident that occurred on May 20, 2024, at its erstwhile central warehouse. The fire resulted in a significant loss of inventory valued at ₹50.85 Crores. Bajaj Allianz General Insurance Co. Limited has completed its assessment and settled the claim for ₹23.00 Crores, which the company has accepted and will receive in due course. The company had previously recognized a receivable of ₹43.65 Crores for FY 2025 against this loss. Despite the incident, the company experienced minimal disruption, having successfully shifted its entire operation to a new state-of-the-art warehouse facility which became fully operational within a month of the accident, ensuring a smooth transition across the supply chain.

  • Company settled fire insurance claim for ₹23.00 Crores.
  • Original inventory loss from fire incident was valued at ₹50.85 Crores.
  • Company had recognized ₹43.65 Crores as receivable for FY25.
  • Operations shifted to a new warehouse within a month, ensuring minimal disruption.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Baazar Style Retail Ltd | Category: Disruption

item.title: [WOSAL] Western Overseas shifts Patiala & Delhi branch offices
item.description:
Western Overseas Study Abroad Ltd has announced the relocation of its branch offices in Patiala and Delhi. The Patiala branch's new address is SCO No. 01, Akal Tower, New Leela Bhawan, approved by the Board on December 9, 2025. The Delhi branch has moved to a new leased office at Property No. DE-84, Third Floor, Tagore Garden, approved on February 4, 2026. Both relocations were effective from April 1, 2026. These strategic moves are intended to support the company's business expansion plans and enhance its operational presence in these key regions.

  • Western Overseas relocated Patiala and Delhi branch offices.
  • Patiala branch relocation approved on December 9, 2025.
  • Delhi branch relocation approved on February 4, 2026.
  • Relocations became effective from April 1, 2026.
  • Moves support business expansion and operational presence.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Western Overseas Study Abroad Ltd | Category: Expansion

item.title: [EVEXIA] Evexia Lifecare's Statutory Auditor M. A. Shah & Co. Resigns
item.description:
Evexia Lifecare Ltd. announced the resignation of its Statutory Auditor, M/s M. A. Shah & Co., effective February 12, 2026. The auditor, appointed on January 18, 2025, to fill a casual vacancy, stated their tenure was tied to the conclusion of the Annual General Meeting (AGM) for FY 2024-25. As the AGM was not held within the stipulated or extended timeframe, M. A. Shah & Co. conveyed their unwillingness to continue beyond the appointed term. They confirmed no other material reasons for their resignation, noting all observations were included in the FY 2024-25 audit report.

  • Statutory Auditor M. A. Shah & Co. resigned from Evexia Lifecare.
  • Resignation is effective from February 12, 2026.
  • Auditor's tenure was linked to the delayed FY24-25 AGM.
  • No other material reasons for resignation were cited by the auditor.
  • All prior audit observations were already communicated.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Evexia Lifecare Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [PHRMASI] Phaarmasia Ltd Shifts Registered Office Within City Limits
item.description:
Phaarmasia Ltd has announced the relocation of its registered office within the local limits of Hyderabad, Telangana. The company's office will move from Plot No. 16, Phase 3, IDA Jeedimetla to P No. 147, IDA, Phase V, IDA Jeedimetla. This administrative change was approved by the company and is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015. The shift is an internal administrative adjustment and does not indicate any significant operational or strategic changes for the company.

  • Phaarmasia Ltd changed its registered office location.
  • The new address is P No. 147, IDA, Phase V, Jeedimetla, Hyderabad.
  • The shift occurred within the same city's local limits.
  • This is an administrative update, not impacting operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PHAARMASIA LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SUZLON] Suzlon Energy clarifies on material price movement
item.description:
Suzlon Energy Ltd observed a Material Price Movement (MPM) in its shares on April 15, 2026, at 9:43 a.m. The company, however, stated that it could not ascertain any specific event or information in the mainstream media that might have triggered this significant price fluctuation. This clarification was issued under Regulation 30(11) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, for the information of its members and the public.

  • Suzlon Energy noted a Material Price Movement in its shares.
  • The price movement occurred on April 15, 2026, at 9:43 a.m.
  • Company found no public information to explain the movement.
  • Clarification issued under SEBI Regulation 30(11).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUZLON ENERGY LTD. | Category: Clarification
